# Elyra

> Elyra is an iPhone fitness app that brings nutrition, strength training, hydration, supplements, HealthKit steps, Live Activity rest timers, community posts and progress tracking into one clear mobile experience.

Official website: https://elyra-app.com/  
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/fr/app/elyra/id6761819130  
Support: support.elyra@gmail.com  
Last updated: 2026-06-30

## Product

- Free iOS fitness app for people who train in the gym and want one place for nutrition, workouts and progress.
- Main features: calorie and macro tracking, workout journal, exercise library, unilateral tracking, supplements, hydration, HealthKit steps, Live Activity rest timer, community feed and progress records.
- Current version promoted on the website: Elyra V1.1.
- Primary audience: French-speaking strength training and fitness users. English pages are also available for product discovery.

## Primary Pages

- [Home FR](https://elyra-app.com/): French landing page for Elyra.
- [Home EN](https://elyra-app.com/index-en.html): English landing page for Elyra.
- [Resources FR](https://elyra-app.com/ressources): Resource hub with calculators, comparisons and fitness guides.
- [Resources EN](https://elyra-app.com/resources): English resource hub.
- [Support](https://elyra-app.com/support.html): Public support page.
- [Privacy Policy](https://elyra-app.com/privacy.html): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://elyra-app.com/terms.html): Terms of use.
- [Account Deletion](https://elyra-app.com/delete-account.html): Account deletion instructions.
